results.name: ARP Request
results.description: Broadcast ARP request for L2 path validation.

results.name: ICMP Echo
results.description: ICMP Echo Request for basic IPv4 reachability.

results.name: UDP Unicast Basic
results.description: Basic UDP payload for PC-FPGA-PC functional validation.

results.name: UDP Sequence
results.description: Sequence payload for loss, duplicate, and ordering checks.

results.name: Payload Pattern AA55
results.description: Alternating AA55 pattern for data-path integrity checks.

results.name: Payload Counter 256
results.description: 0x00..0xff counter pattern for byte-order and truncation checks.

results.name: Frame Size 64
results.description: Minimum Ethernet frame size, excluding FCS.

results.name: Frame Size 128
results.description: 128-byte UDP Ethernet frame excluding FCS.

results.name: Frame Size 256
results.description: 256-byte UDP Ethernet frame excluding FCS.

results.name: Frame Size 512
results.description: 512-byte UDP Ethernet frame excluding FCS.

results.name: Frame Size 1024
results.description: 1024-byte UDP Ethernet frame excluding FCS.

results.name: Frame Size 1514
results.description: Standard untagged max frame length excluding FCS, equivalent to 1518 bytes on wire with FCS.

results.name: VLAN 10 PCP 0
results.description: 802.1Q tagged UDP frame with VID 10 and best-effort PCP 0.

results.name: VLAN 10 PCP 7
results.description: PCP 7 traffic candidate for later TAS scheduled traffic checks.

results.name: VLAN 20 Isolation
results.description: VID 20 traffic for VLAN isolation and filtering checks.

results.name: Unknown Unicast
results.description: Destination MAC intentionally unknown for flooding and FDB checks.

results.name: L2 Multicast
results.description: IPv4 multicast MAC frame for multicast flooding/snooping checks.

results.name: ACL UDP Block Candidate
results.description: UDP dst port 60001 candidate for ACL drop/counter validation.

results.name: Periodic UDP 1 ms
results.description: 1 ms periodic sequence traffic for interval, jitter, and loss checks.

results.name: PSFP Stream A
results.description: Stream A identifier candidate: multicast DMAC, VID 10, UDP dst 50001.

results.name: PSFP Stream B
results.description: Stream B identifier candidate: multicast DMAC, VID 10, UDP dst 50002.

results.name: Throughput Sweep Marker
results.description: Marker profile referenced by frame-size sweep benchmark; uses benchmark payload with embedded sequence and timestamp.

results.name: Latency Benchmark 1k
results.description: 1000-packet benchmark stream with embedded tx timestamp + sequence to compute one-way latency, jitter, and loss.

results.name: Periodic Jitter 500 us
results.description: Sub-millisecond periodic stream (500 us, 2000 packets) with PCP 7 to evaluate TSN jitter and PSFP gating timing.

results.name: Mixed PCP Burst (PCP 0)
results.description: Best-effort burst on VLAN 10 PCP 0. Combine with profile 24 on PCP 7 from a second sender to verify TSN strict priority / shaper isolates the high-priority stream.

results.name: MTU Edge 1500
results.description: Largest standard Ethernet payload at the 1500 MTU boundary (frame length 1514, no FCS). Verifies the link does not silently fragment or drop at the edge.

results.name: Broadcast Storm Guard
results.description: Short broadcast burst to confirm the switch's storm-control / rate limit kicks in. Receiver should see the configured ceiling, not the full transmit rate.
